title: Attribution
description: A responsibility that an agent has for a resource

hadRole.title: role
hadRole.description: The function of an entity or agent with respect to another entity or resource

agent.title: agent
agent.description: The agent that plays a role in the resource

_oldDocs.rationale: The inclusion of prov:Attribution in the DCAT profile enables clear data source attribution, promoting responsible data sharing and proper citation practices. It aligns the profile with data provenance best practices for accurate attribution in data sharing.
